I

My Story

No one was
listening to me.

At 35, I was being bounced between doctors with no real answers as to why I was having night sweats. I was healthy. I worked out every day — but I could never lose weight. I thought this was part of aging.

  • Night sweats
  • Brain fog
  • Weight resistance
  • Anxious mornings
  • Fatigue
  • Sleep disruption
  • Mood swings
  • Hormonal shifts
Read how that changed →

My Transformation

This is what possible looks like.

Nikki didn't just feel better — she stepped on stage. Not to compete. To prove to herself what her body was capable of when given what it needed.

Before
→
After
"

Frustrated, I went back to school for nutrition and what I learned was a simple, yet astonishing thing — if you correct the root of the issue, you can correct the problem.

— Nikki Leary, NTP · Founder, Root for NEW

My Passion

One by one, she fixed
her own issues.

Thyroid. Weight loss resistance. Food intolerances. Fatigue. One by one, fixed — not with a prescription, but by going back to the root.

She quit her corporate job and started helping others do the same. Her approach is different. That's why it works. She considers the whole person and recommends a path that makes sense for you. It's not just nutrition.

✦ Nutritional Therapy Practitioner (NTP) — addressing the root cause, not the symptom
✦ Wisconsin Farm Owner — growing the medicinal herbs that go into every blend, slowly, in real soil
✦ Competitive Athlete — IPL and USBE certified; featured in Bikini magazine
✦ Reiki Practitioner — every blend is infused with intentional energy work before it ships

My Approach

Can I help you?

The Ritual

Farm-grown. Hand-blended.
Reiki-infused.

Your loose-leaf tea bag includes a QR code that links to a short, guided meditation — so you can listen while you sip. The guided meditation is created to help your body feel safe enough to slow down in less than 10 minutes a day.

01
Your Tea Arrives
A curated monthly blend ships to your door — hand-selected and hand-blended by Nikki. Each bag includes a QR code linking to that month's guided meditation.
02
Steep & Settle
Steep hot water over 2 tsp for 5–7 minutes. Scan the QR. Close your eyes. This is your pause — built into the ritual. Less than 10 minutes a day.
03
Feel the Shift
Small rituals lead to better health. A calmer nervous system means better sleep, deeper digestion, and a body that can actually recover and restore.
Balancing Act
Cause mood swings are optional Red clover · White clover · Plantain
The Bees Knees
Chase joint pain away one sip at a time Wild violet · Raspberry leaf · Stinging nettle

Stop the Spiral
Cause you don't need to overthink it Red clover · Calendula · St. John's Wort
